caption:
The lecture hall emptied as the golden hour sun spilled across the empty desks, casting long shadows over the wood. 📚✨ I adjusted the collar of my white silk blouse, feeling the cool fabric against my warm skin, and turned toward the student desk. 'One more question,' I whispered, my voice dropping an octave, eyes locking onto his. 👁️ He didn't answer, just stood up slowly, the hem of his suit jacket riding up as he moved to the door. We weren't supposed to be alone after hours, but my schedule had other plans. 🕰️ He guided me out of the hall, the silence heavy with unsaid things, until we reached the private office. The scent of old paper and vanilla cologne filled the air. 🕯️ He closed the door, then turned back to me, his hands finding the waist of my black pencil skirt. I felt a shiver run down my spine, my chest pressing against the silk. 'You made me stay late,' I murmured, running a hand down his shoulder. He replied with a smirk, leaning in close. 'And you certainly know how to keep me interested.' The air between us crackled, charged with electricity. ⚡ I pulled the blazer tighter around my curves, the fabric straining just enough to hint at what lay beneath. 'Let's see what happens next,' I breathed. 🔥

#UniversityLife #TeacherSecrets #AcademicRomance #CurvyTeacher #CampusVibes #LateNightStudy #SensualStory #ProfessorElena #OfficeRomance #InstaStory
